prompts.name: Casual Outfit
prompts.text: Dress the subject in a clean modern casual outfit with believable fabric folds, comfortable styling, and everyday appeal.

prompts.name: Oversized Hoodie
prompts.text: Dress the subject in an oversized hoodie with soft fabric, relaxed fit, natural wrinkles, and cozy streetwear energy.

prompts.name: T-Shirt and Jeans
prompts.text: Dress the subject in a simple fitted t-shirt and jeans with realistic cotton and denim textures.

prompts.name: Summer Dress
prompts.text: Dress the subject in a light summer dress with flowing fabric, soft folds, and a bright relaxed feel.

prompts.name: Evening Gown
prompts.text: Dress the subject in an elegant evening gown with graceful drape, refined silhouette, and polished formal styling.

prompts.name: School Uniform
prompts.text: Dress the subject in a neat school uniform with crisp fabric, balanced proportions, and clean presentation.

prompts.name: Business Suit
prompts.text: Dress the subject in a tailored business suit with sharp lines, professional styling, and realistic fabric structure.

prompts.name: Gothic Dress
prompts.text: Dress the subject in a gothic outfit with dark elegant fabrics, lace details, layered textures, and refined dramatic style.

prompts.name: Kimono
prompts.text: Dress the subject in a traditional kimono with tasteful patterns, layered fabric, elegant posture, and refined cultural styling.

prompts.name: Fantasy Armor
prompts.text: Dress the subject in detailed fantasy armor with polished metal, layered cloth, practical structure, and heroic presence.

prompts.name: Maid Uniform
prompts.text: Dress the subject in a classic maid uniform with clean frills, crisp black-and-white contrast, and tidy styling.

prompts.name: Winter Coat
prompts.text: Dress the subject in a warm winter coat with layered fabrics, soft texture, and seasonal comfort.

prompts.name: Streetwear
prompts.text: Dress the subject in stylish modern streetwear with layered pieces, bold silhouette, and urban fashion detail.

prompts.name: Sportswear
prompts.text: Dress the subject in functional sportswear with breathable fabric, active fit, and clean athletic styling.

prompts.name: Fantasy Robes
prompts.text: Dress the subject in layered fantasy robes with flowing fabric, decorative trim, and a magical or scholarly presence.
